title: Extract self-contained MindfulnessGuide component from PreMeditationPage

requirements.text: Create a new `MindfulnessGuide` component (e.g., `frontend/src/components/MindfulnessGuide.tsx`) that encapsulates everything related to the meditation guide section currently rendered inside `PreMeditationPage`: its outer container, title, step content, and the `MeditationGuideStepper` (or equivalent inline rendering). The component should accept the current meditation type (and any content data it needs) as props.

quotes: Just meditation guide. Which includes more details button to knowledge page, its title, its content and container etc.

acceptanceCriteria: The component renders the guide container, title, and step content independently.
No meditation-guide UI markup remains duplicated in `PreMeditationPage`; the page simply renders `<MindfulnessGuide ... />`.
Visual appearance of the guide section is unchanged.

requirements.text: Move the **More Details** button and its navigation logic (routing/redirecting to the Knowledge page) entirely inside the `MindfulnessGuide` component. `PreMeditationPage` must not contain any routing call or handler related to the More Details action.

quotes: logic like more details button that redirect to knowledge page, should exist only in that component

acceptanceCriteria: The `MindfulnessGuide` component internally calls the router's navigate function (or equivalent) to go to the Knowledge page when More Details is clicked.
`PreMeditationPage` passes no `onMoreDetails` callback or navigation handler to the guide component.
Clicking More Details still navigates to the Knowledge page correctly.

requirements.text: Move the **Previous** and **Next** step-navigation button logic (current step index state, increment/decrement handlers, boundary conditions) entirely inside the `MindfulnessGuide` component. The component manages its own step state internally.

quotes: the buttons previous and next logic should be inside that component

acceptanceCriteria: Step index state (`useState`) for the guide stepper lives inside `MindfulnessGuide`, not in `PreMeditationPage`.
`PreMeditationPage` passes no step index, `onNext`, or `onPrevious` props to the guide component.
Previous/Next navigation within the guide works correctly end-to-end.
Boundary behavior (disable or hide buttons at first/last step) is handled inside the component.

requirements.text: Update `PreMeditationPage` to replace all extracted guide-related markup and state with a single `<MindfulnessGuide meditationType={...} />` usage. Ensure no orphaned state variables, handlers, or JSX fragments related to the guide remain in `PreMeditationPage`.

quotes: Including their logic, should be separated into that component

acceptanceCriteria: `PreMeditationPage` contains a single `<MindfulnessGuide>` element where the guide section previously existed.
No guide-specific `useState` hooks, step handlers, or More Details handlers remain in `PreMeditationPage`.
The rest of the pre-meditation page (mood/energy selectors, timer settings, ambient sound, start button) is unaffected.

constraints: Do not alter any other section of PreMeditationPage (mood/energy pickers, duration input, ambient music carousel, start button, etc.).
Do not modify any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
The visual design and layout of the guide section must remain identical after the refactor.
nonGoals: Refactoring any other section of PreMeditationPage into separate components.
Adding new features or changing the content of the meditation guide.
Modifying the KnowledgePage or its routing configuration.
